+# Changelog
+
+## [1.0.34] - 2025-10-15
+
+### Added
+- Initial React Router v7 + Module Federation demo
+- Bridge router integration with `enableBridgeRouter: true`
+- Enhanced error boundaries with React Router v7
+- Multiple demo routes (Home, Detail, About)
+- Styled components with Emotion
+- TypeScript support
+
+### Features
+- React Router v7 data APIs
+- Module Federation bridge components
+- Modern build setup with Rsbuild
+- Enhanced routing capabilities
+- Better developer experience

+# Router Remote6 (React Router v7 Demo)
+
+A Module Federation remote application demonstrating React Router v7 integration.
+
+## Features
+
+- 🎯 **React Router v7**: Latest routing capabilities with improved DX
+- ⚡ **Module Federation**: Micro-frontend architecture
+- 🔧 **Rsbuild**: Fast build tool with Rspack
+- 🎨 **Emotion**: Styled components with great performance
+- 🧩 **Bridge Components**: Seamless integration with host applications
+
+## React Router v7 Highlights
+
+This demo showcases React Router v7 new features:
+- Enhanced data loading patterns
+- Better TypeScript support  
+- Improved error boundaries
+- Future-ready APIs
+- Better performance
+
+## Development
+
+```bash
+# Start development server
+npm run dev
+
+# Build for production
+npm run build
+
+# Preview production build
+npm run preview
+```
+
+## Usage
+
+The application exposes two federated modules:
+
+- `./button`: A styled button component
+- `./export-app`: The main app component with routing
+
+## Configuration
+
+The Module Federation configuration explicitly enables bridge router:
+
+```typescript
+bridge: {
+  enableBridgeRouter: true, // ✅ Explicitly enable bridge router for React Router v7
+}
+```
+
+## Routes
+
+- `/` - Home page
+- `/detail` - Detail page with sample content
+- `/about` - About page explaining React Router v7 features
+
+## Port
+
+Development server runs on `http://localhost:2006`

+
+## Bridge Router Configuration
+
+The `bridge.enableBridgeRouter` option allows you to control the bridge router functionality:
+
+- **`enableBridgeRouter: true`** - Explicitly enable bridge router functionality for automatic routing context and basename injection
+- **`enableBridgeRouter: false`** - Disable bridge router functionality if you don't need routing features or want to handle routing manually
+- **Not specified** - Auto-detection based on whether `@module-federation/bridge-react` is installed (default behavior)
+
+:::tip
+If you don't need the bridge router functionality, you can explicitly disable it:
+
+```ts
+// rsbuild.config.ts
+export default defineConfig({
+  plugins: [
+    pluginModuleFederation({
+      name: 'remote1',
+      bridge: {
+        enableBridgeRouter: false, // Disable bridge router if not needed
+      },
     }),
   ],
 });
 ```
+
+This can improve build performance and reduce bundle size when routing features are not required.
+:::
+
 At this point, we have completed the export of the application type module.

+## Bridge Router 配置
+
+`bridge.enableBridgeRouter` 选项允许您控制 bridge router 功能：
+
+- **`enableBridgeRouter: true`** - 显式启用 bridge router 功能，自动处理路由上下文和 basename 注入
+- **`enableBridgeRouter: false`** - 禁用 bridge router 功能，适用于不需要路由功能或希望手动处理路由的场景
+- **未指定** - 基于是否安装了 `@module-federation/bridge-react` 进行自动检测（默认行为）
+
+:::tip
+如果您不需要 bridge router 功能，可以显式禁用它：
+
+```ts
+// rsbuild.config.ts
+export default defineConfig({
+  plugins: [
+    pluginModuleFederation({
+      name: 'remote1',
+      bridge: {
+        enableBridgeRouter: false, // 如不需要可禁用 bridge router
+      },
+    }),
+  ],
+});
+```
+
+这可以在不需要路由功能时提高构建性能并减少包体积。
+:::
+
 至此，我们已经完成了应用类型模块的导出。
 
 :::info
